facebook.caption: Tourists book the loud resorts. Savvy travelers book Seashells Phu Quoc Hotel & Spa. Private beach area, spa, pool, free breakfast, all on 01 Võ Thị Sáu right in Duong Dong. 4.4 stars across 2,826 reviews. The kind of place that earns repeat guests, not just one-night stays. Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
